title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCIII. Games.
content:
Whoop, whoop, and hollow,
        Good dogs won't follow,
        Without the hare cries "pee wit."
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCIII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
